snippet: This procedure describes how to treat a student having: Note: For a student who is not a known to have asthma, this treatment: Warning : Immediately call 000 and ask for an ambulance and state a student is having an asthma attack if: Delay in treatment may increase the severity of the attack and ultimately risk the student’s life. If a student appears to be having difficulty breathing but has not been diagnosed with asthma, the school staff should follow asthma first aid procedures External Link .
